rows.warmup_requirement: Post-3/4 in-window only; up to 37 base 5m bars for logret_36/vol_36, 36 bars for volume_z.
rows.notes: Native v4 live-base contract. Data can come entirely from 3/4 onward if early-edge rows are allowed to warm up.

rows.notes: No old history requirement; depends on 1m continuity and synth-minute handling.
